species: Mice were maintained and bred at the LMB Ares facility
tissue: The mammalian suprachiasmatic nucleus (SCN) orchestrates daily (circadian) rhythms...
cell_type: by broadcasting timing cues generated autonomously by its mutually reinforcing network of ~10,000 neurons...
sample_source: To define the circadian proteome of free‐running SCN tissue...
age: Mice of postnatal day 10 (P10) to P12 and of either sex were killed...
cell_line: Period2::Luciferase (Per2::Luc) mice (Yoo et al.) were a gift from Dr. J.S. Takahashi...
strain: back‐crossed in‐house onto C57BL/6J mice (Jackson Laboratories)...
